workflow.name: Generate a weekly business health report from Google Sheets with Claude
workflow.description:
# **Overview**
Stop spending Monday mornings manually pulling numbers and building reports. This workflow reads your last 7 days of business data from Google Sheets, asks Claude AI to compare it to the week before, spot trends, flag problems and highlight wins — then emails a plain-English health report to your inbox before your team standup.

## How it works

- Fires every Monday at 7AM automatically
- Pulls this week's and last week's data from your Google Sheet
- Formats both datasets into a clean comparison table
- Claude AI analyses the numbers and writes a structured health report covering wins, concerns, and top 3 actions
- Report is emailed to your team via Gmail
- Every run is logged to a second sheet tab for historical tracking


## Setup steps

1.  **Google Sheets** — Connect your Google account in Fetch This Week Data and Fetch Last Week Data nodes and select your data sheet. Each row should be one day, columns should be your key metrics
2. **Configure node** — Open Configure Report Settings and set your business name, report email, and a plain-English description of what your columns mean
3. **Claude AI** — Add your Anthropic API key to the Claude Sonnet sub-node from console.anthropic.com
4. **Gmail** — Connect your Gmail account in Send Weekly Report
5. **Log sheet** — Create a second tab called Report Log with columns: Date, Week Covered, Business, Status, Summary. Connect it in Log Report Run
6. **Activate** — runs automatically every Monday at 7AM

workflow.name: AI Weekly Business Health Report: Analyse Google Sheets Data and Email Insights with Claude

parameters.content:
## AI Weekly Business Health Report using Claude and Gmail

Stop spending Monday mornings building reports in spreadsheets. This workflow reads your last 7 days of business data from Google Sheets, asks Claude AI to find the trends, flag any problems, and highlight the wins -- then emails a plain-English summary straight to your inbox before your team standup.

### How it works

1. A schedule trigger fires every Monday at 7AM.
2. The Configure node sets your business name, report email, and the date range for the past 7 days and the 7 days before that.
3. This week's data and last week's data are both pulled from your Google Sheet.
4. A Code node formats both datasets into a clean comparison table for Claude to read.
5. Claude AI analyses the numbers, compares this week to last week, identifies trends, flags anything that looks off, and highlights wins.
6. The report is formatted as a clean plain-text email and sent to your team via Gmail.
7. Every report run is logged to a second sheet tab with the date and a summary for historical tracking.

### Setup steps

- [ ] **Google Sheets** -- Create a sheet where each row is one day and columns are your key metrics (e.g. Revenue, Leads, Calls, Conversions). Connect your Google account in the Fetch This Week and Fetch Last Week nodes and select your sheet.
- [ ] **Configure node** -- Open Configure Report Settings and set YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME, YOUR_REPORT_EMAIL, and YOUR_METRICS_DESCRIPTION (a short plain-English description of what your columns mean).
- [ ] **Claude AI** -- Click the Claude Sonnet sub-node under Analyse with Claude, add a new Anthropic credential, and paste your API key from console.anthropic.com.
- [ ] **Gmail** -- Connect your Gmail account in the Send Weekly Report node.
- [ ] **Log sheet** -- Create a second tab in your Google Sheet called Report Log with columns: Date, Summary, Status. Connect it in the Log Report Run node.
- [ ] Activate the workflow. It will run automatically every Monday at 7AM.

### Customization

Change the trigger day and time in the Weekly Schedule Trigger node to suit your team. Add more data sources by pulling from additional sheets before the Format Data node. Swap Claude Sonnet for Claude Haiku to reduce API cost if your dataset is small.

## Schedule and configure

Fires every Monday at 7AM and sets up your business name, recipient email, and the exact date ranges for this week and last week so every downstream node knows what period to pull.

## Fetch and format data

Pulls this week's rows and last week's rows from your Google Sheet in parallel, then merges them into a single formatted comparison table that Claude can read clearly.

## Analyse with Claude AI

Claude Sonnet reads both weeks of data and returns a structured business health report covering: week-on-week changes, trends, any metrics that look off, and the top 3 actions to take this week.

Edit the system prompt in this node to describe your business and what good performance looks like for you.

## Send report and log run

Sends the finished plain-text report to your team via Gmail, then logs the run date and a short summary to your Report Log sheet so you have a historical record of every weekly report.

parameters.text:
=You are a sharp business analyst reviewing weekly performance data for {{ $json.business_name }}.

Your job is to write a clear, honest weekly business health report that a busy owner can read in 2 minutes.

METRICS IN THIS DATASET: {{ $json.metrics_description }}

DATA:
{{ $json.formatted_data }}

Write the report using EXACTLY this structure:

WEEKLY BUSINESS HEALTH REPORT -- {{ $json.run_date }}

OVERALL HEALTH: [One of: Strong / Steady / Needs Attention / Critical]

WEEK-ON-WEEK SUMMARY:
Write 2-3 sentences comparing this week to last week in plain English. Be specific with numbers.

WHAT IS WORKING:
- [specific win with numbers]
- [specific win with numbers]

WHAT NEEDS ATTENTION:
- [specific concern with numbers and why it matters]
- [specific concern with numbers and why it matters]

TOP 3 ACTIONS THIS WEEK:
1. [Concrete action -- one sentence]
2. [Concrete action -- one sentence]
3. [Concrete action -- one sentence]

TREND TO WATCH:
One sentence on the most important trend developing across both weeks.

Rules: Be direct. Use actual numbers from the data. Do not hedge or add disclaimers. If data is missing or incomplete, say so and explain what you can still see.

parameters.message:
={{ 'Hi,

Here is your automated weekly business health report for the week of ' + $json.this_week_start + ' to ' + $json.this_week_end + '.

' + $json.report_text + '

---
Generated automatically by your n8n AI Business Health Report workflow.' }}
parameters.subject: ={{ 'Weekly Business Health Report - ' + $json.run_date }}

user.name: Akshay Chug
user.bio:
Akshay is a B2B automation specialist helping business owners eliminate manual backend processes through AI-driven workflow automation. With deep expertise in n8n, AI agents, and end-to-end pipeline building, he helps companies automate cold outreach, lead follow-up, and core operations — without adding headcount.

Founder of Sunsky AI.
